evals.prompt: Can you review MR !42 in my project? I want to make sure there aren't any bugs before I merge it.
evals.expected_output: The skill should fetch MR !42's diff and metadata, analyze the changes for bugs and issues, and post a signed review comment to the MR.
expectations: Uses glab mr view to fetch MR metadata
Uses glab mr diff to get the changes
Posts review comments using glab api with body=@file pattern
Every comment ends with a signature block containing tool and model name
Provides a summary note at the end

evals.prompt: Check the test coverage on MR !17 — I added a new auth module and want to know if the tests are thorough enough.
evals.expected_output: The skill should focus on test coverage analysis for the auth module changes, identifying gaps and rating their importance.
expectations: Uses glab mr diff to get the changes
Focuses review on test-related aspects (tests aspect)
Identifies critical test gaps and rates them
Does not review non-test code unless it affects testability

evals.prompt: Do a comprehensive review of MR !8 — check code quality, error handling, and suggest any simplifications. I want this to be thorough.
evals.expected_output: The skill should perform a multi-aspect review covering code, errors, and simplification, posting individual findings and a comprehensive summary.
expectations: Reviews multiple aspects: code, errors, simplify
Posts individual findings for each issue found
Posts a comprehensive summary note categorizing issues by severity
Uses confidence scoring for code issues
Signature block present on all comments
